Off Calendar Jul-30-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
APPEARANCE: Christopher J. Mead, 765-6232 and Eric R. Havian, 836-9000 for plaintiff Barr; Robert A. Van Nest, 391-5400 for defendant Old Republic; Karen Z Bovarnick, 703-5550 for State of California.
Ruling: Court disclosed to counsel that its former research attorney on this case is now working for plaintiff counsel's firm. Plaintiff counsel assured the court that he would keep that person from working on this case. Defense counsel did not object to have Judge Robertson to continue to preside over this case. Case managment conference held. Court ordered a hearing for defendants' demurrer to complaint on 9-20-04 at 3:30 p.m. Reply due on 9-13-04. Opposition due date to be arranged by counsel. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 (503)
